name: TI-IOC Match - Malicious File Hash Detected
conditions_text: when any of File Hash (custom), SHA256 Hash (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) OpenCTI - SHA256 File Hashes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY TI-IOC Match - Malicious File Hash Detected on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of File Hash (custom), SHA256 Hash (custom) are contained in any of (Shared) OpenCTI - SHA256 File Hashes - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: TI-IOC Match - Malicious File Hash Detected
Event description: Detects any matching IOCs of hash files.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
